def view_profile(request):
    # Violation: manually extracting header context in every business function creates tight coupling to transport layers
    trace_id = request.headers.get("X-Trace-Id")
    logger.info(f"[{trace_id}] Viewing profile")

def edit_profile(request):
    trace_id = request.headers.get("X-Trace-Id")
    logger.info(f"[{trace_id}] Editing profile")
